texto: he said this turning his strong body to face the beautiful, stunning, breathtaking, astonishing, bewildering girl who was a princess and his one true love, Eodwyn. she had hair like raven wings and skin like snow that the dogs haven’t peed on yet and cheeks like cherry blossoms and eyes like a magnificent summer sky.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a J.K. Ashton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “he said this turning his strong body to face the beautiful, stunning, breathtaking, astonishing, …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, beautiful, elf pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e elf.
